untranslatable_reason: Signal requires real-time bid-ask spread data, round-trip commission calculations, and market microstructure (best bid/ask prices, order fill logic). These are not available in the allowed indicator set which contains only OHLCV-derived technical indicators. The strategy is fundamentally a market-making/arbitrage signal that requires tick-level order book data, not a pattern-based technical signal.
translation_notes: This signal requires: (1) Current bid-ask spread comparison to threshold (2 ticks), (2) Real-time commission per share calculation, (3) Ability to route buy orders to best bid and sell orders to best ask, (4) Order fill/rejection logic. None of these operational/microstructure requirements can be expressed using standard OHLCV technical indicators. A backtester using only daily/hourly OHLC data cannot replicate this intraday spread arbitrage strategy.
